name: zonal-zero-trust-authenticator-1.0.0
comment: Software Bill of Materials for the norxs zonal-zero-trust-authenticator reference implementation. Maintained as an OpenChain ISO/IEC 5230 conformance artifact. The production library (zzta_core) has ZERO third-party dependencies; GoogleTest is a build-time test dependency only and is never linked into zzta_core.

hasExtractedLicensingInfos.name: norxs Reference Implementation License v1.0
hasExtractedLicensingInfos.extractedText: See the LICENSE file at the repository root for the full license text. Summary: source-available reference implementation for evaluation, education, and competitive differentiation; commercial use requires a separate license agreement with norxs Technology LLC.

packages.name: zzta_core
packages.copyrightText: (c) 2026 norxs Technology LLC. All rights reserved.
packages.summary: Zero-Trust SPDM authentication engine for Zonal ECUs over SOME/IP. Zero-heap, zero-exception AUTOSAR C++14 static library.

packages.name: googletest
packages.copyrightText: Copyright 2008, Google Inc. All rights reserved.
packages.summary: C++ test framework. Build-time TEST dependency only; fetched via CMake FetchContent (commit-hash pinned) when ZZTA_BUILD_TESTS=ON. Not redistributed in this repository and never linked into zzta_core.
